headlines.headline: Pleven Trading Co withdraws from Middle East market citing unfavorable conditions

sentiment.reasoning: Withdrawing from a market due to unfavorable conditions suggests a negative impact on revenue and market presence, though it could also be a strategic move to cut losses.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
